message:
feat(harness): Add agent harness examples (minimal, streaming, modal)

- examples/minimal.rs: <50 LOC bare minimum harness demo
- examples/streaming.rs: High-volume log streaming without flicker
- examples/modal.rs: Full-screen AltScreen modal file picker

Also fixes clippy collapsible_if warning in virtualized.rs and
adjusts imports for future rendering support.

Part of bd-2kj (Agent Harness Reference Application)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
